title: Big Technology AI Summit (full): Greg Brockman, Mike Krieger, Aaron Levie & Friends of The Podcast
summary: The Big Technology AI Summit convenes industry leaders to discuss the federal government's forced recall of Anthropic's frontier models Fable and Mythos. Participants debate whether this regulatory action constitutes the "AI pause" critics have demanded, the infrastructure buildout race, enterprise AI adoption challenges, and the shift from token maximization to outcome-focused strategies.
